title: More Aeronautics Void Seas
description: Makes the Create Aeronautics End Sea spawn in the other two dimensions.
body:
A very simple mod that adds the Create: Aeronautics End Sea to the Overworld and Nether 40 blocks below the lowest y level where you can place blocks, which is -40 for the end and nether and -104 in the overworld.
Now the End can't hog the void sea for itself. and the aether, I guess...

Does not add anything to break bedrock, that's up to you. (although i DO have [a mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockstuff) for that.)

here's [the discord](https://discord.gg/rKUTCWPkvD), btw.
